about_text.name: about_text
about_text.default: 'A community toy library serving Kenmore and Brisbane''s west since 1978. Not-for-profit, volunteer-run, and proud of it.'

acknowledgement.name: acknowledgement
acknowledgement.default: 'Brisbane West Toy Library acknowledges the Traditional Custodians of the land on which we meet and play — the Turrbal and Yuggera peoples — and pays respect to their Elders past, present, and emerging.'

hero_tagline.name: hero_tagline
hero_tagline.default: 'Borrow quality toys for your child''s world — sustainably, affordably, together.'

about_section_body.name: about_section_body
about_section_body.default: 'A toy library is exactly what it sounds like — a library for toys. Members pay a small annual fee and borrow quality educational toys, puzzles, games, and outdoor equipment, returning them when their child is ready for something new.'

membership_section_subheading.name: membership_section_subheading
membership_section_subheading.default: 'One annual fee. Unlimited borrowing. No hidden costs. Concession rates available.'

membership_section_disclaimer.name: membership_section_disclaimer
membership_section_disclaimer.default: 'Lost or damaged toys may incur a replacement fee. See our T&Cs for details.'

contact_section_intro.name: contact_section_intro
contact_section_intro.default: 'Questions about membership, toys, or volunteering? Drop us a line.'

note.name: note
note.default: 'Lost or damaged toys may incur a replacement fee. See our T&Cs for details.'

intro.name: intro
intro.default: 'Brisbane West Toy Library is run entirely by volunteers. Members contribute 2 shifts per year and receive 1 month of membership free — a small effort that keeps the library running for everyone.'

intro.name: intro
intro.default: 'We stock hundreds of quality educational toys, puzzles, games, and outdoor equipment — updated regularly with new additions.'

catalogue_card_body.name: catalogue_card_body
catalogue_card_body.default: 'Our full toy catalogue is hosted on SETLS, the platform we use to manage borrowing. Members can log in to place reservations.'
